release: Live Source Check Automation + Release Health Dashboard

entries.summary: Added live-source check matrix, source aging policy, release health dashboard, and source verification badge data.
entries.note: Run scripts/live_source_check_matrix.py --live and scripts/check_official_links_live.py --live in a networked maintainer environment before relying on live source status.

entries.summary: All official source records remain marked as needing reverification in the release build.
entries.note: The release intentionally avoids claiming healthy URLs without live network verification.
